user_prompt: 主要专注于所有和 store-only 相关的偏移 issue。当前架构更改成只有 store 存储 knowledge，0 用户，不希望存在偏移或补丁逻辑。

calibration.severity_baseline: Because Fabric v2.0 has zero production users, legacy project-local knowledge fallback, migration shim, and compatibility patch paths should be treated as drift, not acceptable backwards compatibility.

dimensions.name: legacy-project-local-knowledge-paths
dimensions.description: Find remaining code paths, templates, docs, hooks, tests, or schemas that read/write project-local .fabric/knowledge, .fabric/agents.meta.json knowledge roots, or other non-store knowledge locations after the store-only cutover.

dimensions.name: legacy-fallback-and-migration-shims
dimensions.description: Find fallback, migrate, compat, legacy, or patch branches that keep old knowledge storage alive despite the zero-user clean-slate decision.

dimensions.name: docs-skills-bootstrap-store-only-drift
dimensions.description: Find user-facing or AI-facing docs, bootstrap text, skill templates, hook banners, snapshots, and quickstarts that still instruct users or agents to manage knowledge outside mounted stores.

dimensions.name: runtime-store-resolution-bypass
dimensions.description: Find runtime services/tools/commands that bypass store bindings/write target resolution and directly touch knowledge files, counters, events, pending entries, or metadata in the repo-local tree.

dimensions.name: tests-fixtures-snapshots-stale-contracts
dimensions.description: Find tests, fixtures, snapshots, and contract schemas that still assert old knowledge roots, migration behavior, old CLI help, or patch-style compatibility instead of store-only contracts.
